summary: Comprehensive testing of GIG ZipFinder after DNS resolution. Preview environment fully functional. CRITICAL: Production site (www.gigzipfinder.com) has broken API routing - all /api/* requests return HTML instead of JSON. Additionally, Stripe API key is EXPIRED.

critical.issue: PRODUCTION BACKEND COMPLETELY DOWN - All API calls to https://www.gigzipfinder.com/api/* return frontend HTML instead of API responses. Railway deployment is serving ONLY frontend, backend API routing not configured.
Stripe API key EXPIRED - Error: 'Expired API Key provided: sk_live_*****XFOyFC'. All payment-related endpoints fail with 400 status.

minor.issue: Terms content still mentions 'Google Voice' in DEFAULT_TERMS_EN and DEFAULT_TERMS_ES constants

integration_issues.issue: Stripe checkout fails due to expired API key

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Railway deployment to properly route /api/* requests to backend service. Currently all requests go to frontend SPA.
CRITICAL: Generate new Stripe LIVE API keys from Stripe Dashboard - current keys are expired
Update backend/.env with new STRIPE_SECRET_KEY and STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY
OPTIONAL: Remove 'Google Voice' references from DEFAULT_TERMS_EN/ES in server.py
critical_code_review_comments: Railway deployment configuration appears to serve only frontend - backend service may not be deployed or API routing rules missing
Stripe keys have expired - need to regenerate from Stripe Dashboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview environment at https://gif-tools-central.preview.emergentagent.com is fully functional. Production at https://www.gigzipfinder.com has critical backend routing issue - all /api/* requests return frontend HTML. Stripe API keys are expired. Testing was done against preview environment. DNS resolution (www.gigzipfinder.com loads with HTTPS) appears working, but backend API routing is broken.

domain_ssl.details: www.gigzipfinder.com loads with HTTPS, SSL valid

domain_redirect.details: gigzipfinder.com (without www) does not respond - timeout

purchase_flow_ui.details: Purchase page UI renders correctly with terms checkbox, $20 price

purchase_flow_stripe.details: Stripe checkout fails - API key expired

ai_zip_search.details: AI search returns 5 ZIP codes with scores, reasons, sources

dashboard_access_control.details: Unpaid users see 'Sin acceso. Realiza la compra primero.' message

language_switching.details: Language selector works - English, Spanish, Portuguese available

mobile_responsive.details: Mobile viewport (390x844) shows hamburger menu, stacked layout

comprar_ahora_button.details: Button scrolls page from 0 to 3313px to #buy-now section

google_voice_removal_ui.details: No 'Google Voice' text visible on homepage or purchase pages

backend_test_results.failure_details: test_check_payment_by_user_invalid - Stripe API returns 400 due to expired key

production_issues.api_routing: BROKEN - All /api/* requests return frontend HTML instead of JSON responses
production_issues.stripe_keys: EXPIRED - sk_live_* key no longer valid

notes: Testing conducted on preview environment since production API is completely broken. The user needs to fix Railway deployment configuration to properly route API requests to backend service.
